system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonkho_sum_nhap","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_TONKHO_SUM_NHAP](@MACT NVARCHAR(200), @SOLUONG_NHAP DECIMAL(18, 3))
AS
IF EXISTS (SELECT mavt FROM tr_material WHERE mavt = @MACT AND ISNULL(xoa,'N') = 'N')
BEGIN
    --LẤY RA VẬT TƯ THUỘC KHO NÀO
    DECLARE @MAKHO NVARCHAR(50)
    DECLARE @TENKHO NVARCHAR(50)
    SELECT @TENKHO = kho FROM tr_material WHERE mavt = @MACT
    
    SELECT @MAKHO = [name] FROM tr_site WHERE [description] = @TENKHO
    IF @MAKHO IS NULL
      SET @MAKHO = 'OTHER'
--    SELECT @MAKHO = CASE 
--				    WHEN kho = N'VẬT TƯ KHÁC' THEN 'OTHER'
--				    WHEN kho = N'HÀNG TRẮNG' THEN 'HTR'
--				    WHEN kho = N'HÓA CHẤT' THEN 'SON'
--				    WHEN kho = N'GỖ VÁN' THEN 'GVA'
--				    WHEN kho = N'NGŨ KIM' THEN 'NKI'
--				    WHEN kho = N'THÀNH PHẨM' THEN 'GWHS'
--				    WHEN kho = N'BAO BÌ' THEN 'DGO'
--			    END
--    FROM tr_material WITH(NOLOCK)
--    WHERE mavt = @MACT
    
    

    --LẤY SỐ LƯỢNG TỒN KHO HIỆN TẠI
    DECLARE @ID INT
    DECLARE @SOLUONG_TON DECIMAL(18, 3)
    SELECT @ID = id, @SOLUONG_TON = ISNULL(soluong,0)
    FROM tr_tonkho_sum WITH(NOLOCK)
    WHERE mavt = @MACT AND makho = @MAKHO

    IF @SOLUONG_TON IS NULL
	   SET @SOLUONG_TON = 0

    IF @ID IS NOT NULL --NẾU VẬT TƯ ĐÃ CÓ TỒN KHO
    BEGIN
	   UPDATE tr_tonkho_sum
	   SET soluong = @SOLUONG_TON + @SOLUONG_NHAP
	   WHERE id = @ID
    END
    ELSE --NẾU VẬT TƯ CHƯA CÓ TỒN KHO
    BEGIN
	   INSERT INTO tr_tonkho_sum(mavt, makho, soluong, soluong_toithieu)
	   VALUES (@MACT, @MAKHO, @SOLUONG_NHAP, 0)
    END

END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_site","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
